Why Most Startup Websites Fail (And How We Built Brovate to Fix That)
Most startups don’t fail because they have a bad idea.
They fail because people never understand what they actually do.
Over the last few years, I’ve analyzed hundreds of startup websites — from early-stage SaaS products to service businesses and funded companies. One pattern kept showing up.
The product might be great.
The team might be talented.
The technology might even be better than competitors.
Yet the website quietly kills conversions before a conversation ever begins.
That realization is one of the reasons I started Brovate.
Not as another web development agency.
But as a startup execution partner.
